title: centella repanda
intro: Centella repanda, also known as Gotu Kola, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia that belongs to the Apiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Centella repanda include improved cognitive function, enhanced wound healing, and reduced risk of neurodegenerative diseases, such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. In herbal preparations, Centella repanda is often used to make teas, capsules, and topical creams, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
